meta.title: LLM Tool Use - GPT4o-mini, Groq & Llama.cpp
meta.description:
➡️ Get Life-time Access to the ADVANCED-inference Repo (incl. notebooks in this vid.): https://trelis.com/ADVANCED-inference/
➡️ Trelis Runpod Affiliate Link (supports the channel): https://runpod.io?ref=jmfkcdio
➡️ One-click GPU templates: https://github.com/TrelisResearch/one-click-llms

VIDEO RESOURCES:
- Slides: https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1_aYqoGhI1yv9GdOM5lAgq3kQQnSk70mLkQkbVoPlE20/edit?usp=sharing
- llama.cpp repo: https://github.com/ggerganov/llama.cpp/blob/master/docs/build.md
- groq api: https://console.groq.com/docs/api-reference
- openai api: https://platform.openai.com/docs/models/gpt-4o-mini
- Phi-3 Mini 128k: https://huggingface.co/microsoft/Phi-3-mini-128k-instruct
- Phi-3 Mini 4-bit GGUF: https://huggingface.co/microsoft/Phi-3-mini-4k-instruct-gguf

OTHER TRELIS LINKS:
➡️ Trelis Newsletter: https://blog.Trelis.com
➡️ Trelis Resources and Support: https://Trelis.com/About

1:19:00 Resources
